metaDescription: Qwen3 (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-04-28 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Hybrid 'think deeper, act faster' family with dense 0.6B/1.7B/4B/8B/14B/32B…
overview: Qwen3 is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2025-04-28. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.

What's notable in this version: Hybrid 'think deeper, act faster' family with dense 0.6B/1.7B/4B/8B/14B/32B and MoE 30B-A3B/235B-A22B models, dual thinking/non-thinking modes; trained on ~36T tokens across 119 languages; Apache 2.0.
